sections.one_line: Current live status and inbound SMS polling without a public server
SMS inbound polling and outbound sending flow between Twilio and the Discord bot
Kernos SMS and Discord environment variables for Twilio credentials and instance identity
Limits access to authorized phone numbers and the owner number
Twilio SMS channel status for outbound sending in manage_channels list
Locations of key Kernos SMS components and startup wiring in the codebase
